name: @sarva-varadi/core
description: Core library for Sarva-Varadi test reporter - common types, adapters, and report generation

scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const src='src/generators'; const dst='dist/generators'; const dstScreenshots='dist/screenshots'; if(!fs.existsSync(dst)) fs.mkdirSync(dst, {recursive:true}); if(!fs.existsSync(dstScreenshots)) fs.mkdirSync(dstScreenshots, {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,'varadi-styles.css'), path.join(dst,'varadi-styles.css')); fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,'varadi-scripts.js'), path.join(dst,'varadi-scripts.js')); fs.copyFileSync('screenshots/logo.svg', path.join(dstScreenshots,'logo.svg'));"
